# SABDA Studio

> SABDA is an immersive audio visual wellness studio in Barcelona combining 360 degree projection, Dolby Atmos spatial audio, and a curated teacher roster across yoga, pilates, sound healing, breathwork, ice bath and ecstatic dance. Located in the Eixample district at C/Muntaner 83B, Local 2, 08011 Barcelona, Spain. Classes are booked via a custom native checkout on sabdastudio.com powered by Momence.

SABDA Studio is the trading name of SABDA Studio S.L. (CIF B44704401). The venue seats approximately 80 students in the immersive room and welcomes up to 100 standing. The studio runs roughly 43 classes per week in English and Spanish with 14 recurring teachers.

**What makes SABDA different**: every class happens inside a 360 degree projection environment with cinema grade Dolby Atmos sound. Visuals are programmed per class, synchronized to the music and movement. SABDA sits at the intersection of art, technology, and wellness. It is not a traditional yoga studio and not a museum, it is something new.

**What SABDA offers**: yoga (Vinyasa, Power Vinyasa, Hatha Vinyasa, Hatha Yoga, Yoga Sculpt, Yin Yoga, Yoga and Breathwork), mat pilates (Core, Power, Full Body, Sculpt), sound healing (Sound Healing, Yin and Sound, Serenity and Sound, Guide Sound Experience), breathwork (Alchemy Breath, Reset and Calm), a patio based ice bath, and live ecstatic dance events. The studio also hosts private events, brand activations, team experiences, and venue rentals.

**What SABDA does not offer**: reformer pilates (all pilates is mat based), yoga nidra, or standalone seated meditation classes. The meditation category on the site groups sound healing, breathwork, and yin into one contemplative collection.

## Contact and location

- Address: C/Muntaner 83B, Local 2, 08011 Barcelona, Spain
- Phone: +34 625 44 98 78
- General email: info@sabdastudio.com
- Corporate and sales: connect@sabdastudio.com
- Website: https://sabdastudio.com
- Spanish site: https://sabdastudio.com/es/
- Catalan site: https://sabdastudio.com/ca/
- Booking platform: Momence (momence.com/u/sabda)

## Pricing (all prices in EUR, current)

- [Intro trial, single class](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 18 EUR
- [Intro 3 Pack](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 50 EUR (recommended entry point, 16.67 per class)
- [Drop in, single class](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 22 EUR
- [5 Pack](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 85 EUR (17 per class)
- [10 Pack](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 149 EUR (14.90 per class)
- [Flex membership, monthly](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 99 EUR
- [Ritual membership, monthly](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 109 EUR
- [Immerse membership, monthly](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 130 EUR (unlimited)
- [Immerse 3 Month pack](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): 330 EUR
- [Ice Bath, single](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/ice-bath/): 12 EUR
- [Ice Bath 3 Pack](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/ice-bath/): 30 EUR
- [Ice Bath 5 Pack](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/ice-bath/): 40 EUR

## Classes

- [Yoga at SABDA](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/yoga/): Vinyasa, Power Vinyasa, Hatha Vinyasa, Hatha Yoga, Yoga Sculpt, Yin Yoga. Roughly 20 yoga classes per week across levels. All in the immersive room with visuals and Dolby Atmos.
- [Pilates at SABDA](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/pilates/): Core, Power, Full Body, Sculpt. Mat only, no reformer. Roughly 10 pilates classes per week.
- [Sound Healing at SABDA](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/sound-healing/): Sound Healing, Yin and Sound, Serenity and Sound, Guide Sound Experience. Roughly 5 sound sessions per week.
- [Breathwork at SABDA](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/breathwork/): Alchemy Breath, Reset and Calm. Roughly 3 breathwork sessions per week.
- [Meditation category](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/meditation/): grouping of sound, breathwork, and yin for contemplative seekers. Not standalone meditation classes.
- [Ice Bath](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/ice-bath/): patio based cold immersion sessions.
- [Ecstatic Dance](https://sabdastudio.com/classes/ecstatic-dance/): live ecstatic dance evenings.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://sabdastudio.com/): overview of the studio, teachers, and immersive experience.
- [Class schedule](https://sabdastudio.com/schedule.html): weekly calendar with booking.
- [Pricing](https://sabdastudio.com/pricing/): full price grid and membership comparison.
- [About SABDA](https://sabdastudio.com/about.html): origin, founders, mission.
- [The space and events](https://sabdastudio.com/events.html): venue details and event hosting.
- [Venue hire](https://sabdastudio.com/hire.html): private rental for brand activations, immersive dinners, launches, and corporate wellness.
- [Blog](https://sabdastudio.com/blog/): guides on wellness, pilates, yoga, sound healing, and things to do in Barcelona.

## For corporate and private events

SABDA hosts brand activations, team experiences, private sound baths, immersive dinners, product launches, and corporate wellness days. Capacity is up to 100 standing or 80 seated in the immersive room, up to 200 standing across the full venue. Rates start at 350 EUR per session and scale by peak time and content package. Contact connect@sabdastudio.com for quotes.

## Languages

The site is trilingual with full English, Spanish, and Catalan versions. Classes are taught primarily in English and Spanish depending on the teacher and slot. The schedule page marks class language.
